intro: Over the past three weeks, ZCyberNews has tracked 25 articles tagged with ai, with Pushpaganda emerging as the most frequently cited threat actor. The coverage spans from April 8 to April 26, 2026, affecting the technology, critical infrastructure, finance, financial services, and government sectors across the United States, Asia, Australia, Canada, and globally. The severity mix includes 11 high-severity incidents, 10 informational reports, 1 critical, and 3 medium-severity events, reflecting a concentrated period of activity.
